## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Jerry Fung (Headline VC) and Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) to discuss Marcel's new AI-powered content marketing startup.](https://fathom.video/share/Cz8zzL2j_ExB5U6czV3xBUWQarYmUEai?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's startup fwd.digital offers AI-augmented content marketing services, combining AI workflows with human expertise to deliver high-quality content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/Cz8zzL2j_ExB5U6czV3xBUWQarYmUEai?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [The company has rapidly grown to 27 clients, $4M ARR, with $5M in pipeline after just 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/Cz8zzL2j_ExB5U6czV3xBUWQarYmUEai?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [fwd.digital's model aims to disrupt traditional agency services by offering higher efficiency and lower costs through AI automation and global talent](https://fathom.video/share/Cz8zzL2j_ExB5U6czV3xBUWQarYmUEai?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Marcel is considering raising capital to accelerate growth, particularly to hire top technical talent](https://fathom.video/share/Cz8zzL2j_ExB5U6czV3xBUWQarYmUEai?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Background and Startup Journey

  - [Brazilian-born, moved to US at 11, developed "underdog mentality"](https://fathom.video/share/Cz8zzL2j_ExB5U6czV3xBUWQarYmUEai?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Built successful content marketing programs at IBM, HP, HashiCorp, and ServiceTitan](https://fathom.video/share/Cz8zzL2j_ExB5U6czV3xBUWQarYmUEai?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Leveraged AI to scale content production at DeepMind, leading to launch of fwd.digital in April 2023](https://fathom.video/share/Cz8zzL2j_ExB5U6czV3xBUWQarYmUEai?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)

### fwd.digital's Business Model

  - [Offers various "work streams" including content refreshes, programmatic SEO, and long-form content](https://fathom.video/share/Cz8zzL2j_ExB5U6czV3xBUWQarYmUEai?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [Pricing ranges from $9K to $39K per month on 12-month contracts](https://fathom.video/share/Cz8zzL2j_ExB5U6czV3xBUWQarYmUEai?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Combines AI workflows, human expertise (editors, strategists), and a growing freelancer network](https://fathom.video/share/Cz8zzL2j_ExB5U6czV3xBUWQarYmUEai?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [Aims to achieve software-like margins through AI efficiency and international talent](https://fathom.video/share/Cz8zzL2j_ExB5U6czV3xBUWQarYmUEai?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)

### Current Traction and Growth

  - [27 active clients with 36 more on waitlist](https://fathom.video/share/Cz8zzL2j_ExB5U6czV3xBUWQarYmUEai?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [$4M in current ARR, $5M in pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/Cz8zzL2j_ExB5U6czV3xBUWQarYmUEai?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
  - [Average deal size of $12K/month, with largest at $39K/month](https://fathom.video/share/Cz8zzL2j_ExB5U6czV3xBUWQarYmUEai?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Projecting continued rapid growth based on strong demand](https://fathom.video/share/Cz8zzL2j_ExB5U6czV3xBUWQarYmUEai?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)

### Future Plans and Potential Fundraising

  - [Bootstrapped so far, with $401K in receivables and $3M in bank](https://fathom.video/share/Cz8zzL2j_ExB5U6czV3xBUWQarYmUEai?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
  - [Considering raising capital to accelerate hiring of top technical talent](https://fathom.video/share/Cz8zzL2j_ExB5U6czV3xBUWQarYmUEai?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
  - [Plans to build out a central platform to manage workflows and talent](https://fathom.video/share/Cz8zzL2j_ExB5U6czV3xBUWQarYmUEai?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jerry to potentially introduce Marcel to relevant portfolio companies or contacts in the content marketing space](https://fathom.video/share/Cz8zzL2j_ExB5U6czV3xBUWQarYmUEai?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - [Marcel to keep Jerry updated on growth progress and any decisions regarding fundraising](https://fathom.video/share/Cz8zzL2j_ExB5U6czV3xBUWQarYmUEai?tab=summary&timestamp=1854.0)
  - [Potential follow-up discussion on how Headline's experience with related investments (Angi, SEMrush) could benefit fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/Cz8zzL2j_ExB5U6czV3xBUWQarYmUEai?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
